paneContent:
‚óè Read leader.role.md
  ‚îÇ .agents/roles/leader.role.md
  ‚îî 38 lines read


‚óè Inspect hub peers (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-5unog9 STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo
  ‚îÇ cat .storyboard/terminals/${STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID}.json | jq '.hubs[0] | {hubId, channel, holdsToken:
  ‚îÇ .holdsToken, peers: [.peers[] | {widgetId, displayName, alias: .props.alias}]}'
  ‚îî 23 lines...


‚óè Start conversation + set goal (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-5unog9 STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo
  ‚îÇ HUB_ID=hub_1cfd5e6970
  ‚îÇ CHANNEL=$(npx storyboard hub state --canvas "$STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID" 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.hubs[0].channel //
  ‚îÇ empty')
  ‚îÇ echo "CHANNEL=$CHANNEL"‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 13 lines...


‚óè List all hubs (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo
  ‚îÇ npx storyboard hub state --canvas "$STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID" 2>/dev/null | jq '.hubs[] | {hubId, channel, leader,
  ‚îÇ members: [.members[].widgetId]}'
  ‚îî 2 lines...


‚óè Dump hubs (shell)
  ‚îÇ export STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID=storyboard-demo STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID=agent-5unog9
  ‚îÇ npx storyboard hub state --canvas "$STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID" 2>/dev/null | jq '.hubs'
  ‚îî 107 lines...

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [‚éá 0.6.0*%]                                                @index.jsx
